narrowIdea: Three real projects on the bench — pick one and we ship it live.

content.title: We'll build two CLIs along the way.

tiles.name: Alarm CLI
tiles.desc: A terminal alarm clock. Schedules, notifications, snooze.

tiles.name: Movie CLI
tiles.desc: Search, browse and surface movie data right from the terminal.

tiles.name: Gitmap
tiles.desc: Map your repos visually. Today's candidate for a new feature.

content.tilesCaption: Click any tile to open the repo.

notes: Three real projects — Gitmap is the most likely candidate for a live feature add.
